title: RealityShift
description: Make every day a new adventure! RealityShift activates a random anomaly daily from a pool of 50+ unique events, completely changing the rules of survival.
body:
# RealityShift
## A New Reality Every Day!
---
**Are you tired of predictable survival? RealityShift breathes new life into your server by activating a new, random anomaly every Minecraft day, completely breaking the standard rules of the game. Your players will never know what to expect: one day they can fly, the next they can't craft. This is a plugin about adaptation, chaos, and endless fun.**

---
## Features
* **50+ Unique Anomalies:** A massive collection of events, from simple game-changers (Low Gravity) to mind-bending challenges (Shared Health for all players).
* **Daily Rule Changes:** Every new in-game day begins with the announcement of a new anomaly.
* **"Double Trouble" Meta-Anomaly:** With a small chance, two anomalies can become active at once, creating unpredictable and hilarious combinations!
* **Fully Configurable:** Disable any anomaly you don't like, customize all messages, and tweak chances in a detailed `config.yml`.
* **Smart Config Updater:** The plugin automatically adds new anomalies to your config file without overwriting your existing settings.
* **Reload Command:** Apply config changes on the fly with the `/rs reload` command.
* **Lightweight & Performant:** Coded to have a minimal impact on your server's performance.

---
## A Glimpse into the Chaos (Sample Anomalies)
<details>
  <summary>Click to see a few examples...</summary>
  
  **Positive Anomalies:**
  * **Gift of Flight:** All players gain the ability to fly, just like in creative mode.
  * **Bountiful Harvest:** All crops and saplings grow several times faster.
  * **Enchanter's Delight:** All enchantments are applied at their maximum possible level.
  
  **Negative & Challenging Anomalies:**
  * **Crafting Amnesia:** Crafting on a crafting table is completely disabled for the day.
  * **The Floor is Lava:** Players take damage if they stand still for more than 3 seconds.
  * **Shared Health:** All players on the server share a single health pool. An injury to one is an injury to all!
  
  **Chaotic Anomalies:**
  * **Player Swap:** Two random players periodically swap their locations.
  * **Unstable Fauna:** Peaceful animals explode upon death.
  * **Random Blocks:** A placed block has a chance to turn into something else entirely.
</details>

---
## Commands & Permissions

**Command:** `/realityshift reload` (alias: `/rs reload`)
* **Description:** Reloads the `config.yml` file.
* **Permission:** `realityshift.reload` (defaults to OP only).

**Permissions:**
* `realityshift.reload` - Allows usage of the reload command.
* `realityshift.*` - Gives access to all RealityShift commands.
